title: oldenlandia polyclada
intro: Oldenlandia polyclada is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a medicinal herb. It is traditionally used for its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia polyclada is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
